assertionResults.evidence: TOOLS.md now has /bridge/order-context as primary QRIS method (5 occurrences in file). /payments/qris/direct is clearly marked DEPRECATED with note to use bridge endpoint instead. Git diff confirms both changes.

TOOLS.md Known Issues section documents QRIS Expired-Reuse Bug with: Gejala (3 bullet points), Penyebab, Workaround sementara (delete state), Fix yang dibutuhkan di backend. grep confirms 3 lines with 'expired|kedaluwarsa'.

grep for 'qty' in ORDER_SYNC.md returns 0 matches. All JSON examples use 'quantity', 'menuName', 'menuId' consistently. Git diff shows no field naming changes needed — worker verified existing consistency.

IDENTITY.md filled with: Name=SobatNgupi, Creature='Barista digital — asisten kopi AI yang jalan di WhatsApp', Vibe='Santai, sopan, fun', Emoji=☕. Also includes persona singkat paragraph. grep confirms 3 occurrences of 'SobatNgupi|barista'.

MEMORY.md had 'Pickup wajib QRIS — tidak boleh COD' rule and full Edge Cases/Critical Rules sections removed. Git diff shows 29 deletions removing those duplicate sections. Remaining content is non-redundant business facts and operational learnings.

Cross-file consistency verified across SOBATNGUPI_PROMPT.md, AGENTS.md, MEMORY.md, ORDER_SYNC.md, TOOLS.md. Payment rules (Pickup QRIS mandatory, Delivery QRIS/COD) consistent across all files. Order flow state machine consistent. No contradictions found.
menu-schema.json JSON validation passed — already validated in prior milestone.
Field naming consistent across all files: 'quantity' (not qty), 'menuName' (not name), 'menuId', shareloc as {lat, lng, label?, source?}. grep confirms no 'qty' in any .md file.

Forbidden words (backend, state, sync, curl, exec, API, endpoint, approve, error, localhost) do not appear in customer-facing content. Technical terms only appear in internal docs (TOOLS.md, AGENTS.md, SOBATNGUPI_PROMPT.md) with appropriate JANGAN/perhatian markers.
All cross-file references verified: menu-schema.json exists, ORDER_SYNC.md exists, TOOLS.md exists, MEMORY.md exists, AGENTS.md exists. AGENTS.md line 7-10 correctly lists all required files.

codeReview.summary: Documentation-only feature. All changes are correct and complete. TOOLS.md restructured with bridge endpoint as primary and deprecated notice. IDENTITY.md filled with SobatNgupi personality. MEMORY.md deduplicated. Cross-file consistency verified. No code changes to review — all edits are markdown documentation.

sharedStateObservations.observation: TOOLS.md contains 'localhost:3001' URLs which are marked forbidden words in AGENTS.md. However, this is consistent with architecture.md and environment.md which document the backend at localhost:3001. The AGENTS.md forbidden-word rule is specifically about not exposing to customers — internal docs correctly reference localhost. No gap in shared state, just the existing convention being applied correctly.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: TOOLS.md lines show curl commands with localhost:3001. AGENTS.md says 'Jangan bocorkan ke customer' with forbidden words list. architecture.md documents 'Backend (localhost:3001)'. All consistent.
